productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Cream-Coloured Printed Churidar Kurta with Dupatta
description: Cream-coloured kurta churidar set with dupattaCream-coloured printed kurta, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, short sleeves and embroidery above the vented hemCream-coloured churidar, has a drawstring waist and tapered legs with a press button closureCream-coloured dupatta with stitch detailing on the endsLength of dupatta: 80.5 cmsFit RegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsA perfect match for all ethnic occasions, this kurta churidar set from vishudh is inspired by traditional Indian prints and designs. The soft cotton kurta with pretty print increases the style quotient while the churidar and contrast ombre dyed dupatta bring in a burst of colour.Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 25"
